events.text: Thiago Silva (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Brazil 0, Netherlands 1. Robin van Persie (Netherlands) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the top right corner.
Arjen Robben (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Brazil 0, Netherlands 2. Daley Blind (Netherlands) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner.
Jonathan de Guzmán (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Fernandinho (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Oscar (Brazil) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Brazil 0, Netherlands 3. Georginio Wijnaldum (Netherlands) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Daryl Janmaat.
